title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 24 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 24 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 24 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/02/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 0.22% today, the main contract closed 909.5.The traders' willingness to ship is less.The steel mills are wait and see .The overall trading sentiment of the market is worse.PBF at Shandong port deal 910-916 yuan/mt;PBF at Tangshan port deal 925 yuan/mt . As of today, the inventory of 35 ports tracked by SMM totaled 138.11 million tons, a cumulative of 1 million tons compared with last week and a decrease of 15.13 million tons compared with the same period last year. The average daily port dredging volume of imported mines in this period increased by 45000 tons to 3.078 million tons on a weekly basis, and the port dredging volume increased for four consecutive periods, and currently returned to a relatively high level, while the port inventory increased for five consecutive periods.
